## Automated Tests Required

*No new unit/integration test files for S90.* This sprint is Config/Data (agent YAML + docs). Regression coverage is the standing gate suite above — run at S90-03 (and optionally per-track before merge).

**Forbidden in this sprint (guard via review + `detect_changes`):**
- Production C# under `src/ProjectAegis.*` (except accidental — reject)
- `DelegationBridge.cs` edits
- `CatalogWriteGate` write-path changes
- Installing `com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp` into `manifest.json` dependencies
- Changing Baltic hash / replay goldens

## Manual QA Checklist

### S90-01 — Agent YAML P0 (A1–A3) — Config/Data

**Verification method:** Diff + grep against ProjectAegis README + Tech-Stack  
**Who must sign off:** unity-specialist owner / qa-lead (docs)  
**Evidence:** PR diff of `.claude/agents/unity-ui-specialist.md` + `.claude/agents/unity-specialist.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] `unity-ui-specialist`: default = **legacy Input Manager**; Input System only after `activeInputHandler` proof + human approval (no “Prefer Input System package for new work”)
- [ ] `unity-specialist` YAML `description`: does not list Input System as a normal default subsystem
- [ ] `unity-specialist`: MCP routing cites `unity/ProjectAegis/.claude/skills/` + README; AI Assistant/Inference noted **present, not agent-owned**
- [ ] A3 dependency noted: agents must not assume MCP package is in manifest deps until B1/setup doc is fixed (or after B1 lands)
- [ ] No production C# / sim changes in the agents track

### S90-02 — Skill/doc P0 (B1–B3) — Config/Data

**Verification method:** Side-by-side vs Tech-Stack.md + `Packages/manifest.json`  
**Who must sign off:** c-sharp-devops-engineer / docs owner  
**Evidence:** PR diff of `Game-Requirements/Claude-Agent-Setup.md`, `docs/engine-reference/unity/VERSION.md`, and any ProjectAegis skill preamble edits

Checklist:
- [ ] **B1** Claude-Agent-Setup: OpenUPM **scopes** yes; `com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp` **not** claimed as a direct `manifest.json` dependency
- [ ] **B1** Checklist item for MCP-in-manifest is **unchecked** (or marked pending) until `npx unity-mcp-cli install-plugin ./unity/ProjectAegis`
- [ ] **B1** Activation prose matches Tech-Stack install-plugin language (no “already listed in dependencies”)
- [ ] **B2** VERSION.md package table includes `com.unity.ui` **2.0.0**, Addressables **2.3.16**, AI Assistant **2.13.0-pre.2**, AI Inference **2.6.1** (or current Tech-Stack pins)
- [ ] **B2** Notes Built-in RP + legacy Input Manager; last-verified date updated
- [ ] **B3** High-traffic ProjectAegis skills (e.g. `tests-run`, `editor-application-set-state`) strengthen “when-not: use headless PlayModeSmoke for C2 gates” where missing
- [ ] Diff does not install the MCP plugin package

### S90-03 — Closeout — Integration

**Verification method:** RUN+READ standing gates + smoke doc review  
**Who must sign off:** producer / qa-lead  
**Evidence:** `production/qa/smoke-sprint-90-closeout-2026-07-*.md` + gates log

Checklist:
- [ ] All standing gates PASS (table above)
- [ ] Track completion table (S90-01..03; optional 04/05)
- [ ] GitNexus `detect_changes` low / docs-only (or re-analyze if needed)
- [ ] sprint-status.yaml S90 block updated toward COMPLETE
- [ ] Stage remains **Release**
- [ ] Forward note: S91 asset specs ready
- [ ] Cites: boundary + execute-plan + this QA plan + sprint-90 plan

### S90-04 — README cross-link — Config/Data (Should Have)

Checklist:
- [ ] AGENTS.md and/or Tech-Stack one-liner points at `unity/ProjectAegis/.claude/README.md` as Input/MCP source of truth
- [ ] Link resolves; no contradictory Input System default nearby

### S90-05 — CLAUDE.md agent count — Config/Data (Nice to Have)

Checklist:
- [ ] CLAUDE.md agent count matches `ls .claude/agents/*.md | wc -l` (expect ~67)
- [ ] Wording does not imply Godot/Unreal engine sets are active for this repo

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via documented manual evidence (diff/grep checklist) OR standing gate RUN+READ for S90-03
- [ ] Manual evidence captured in PR description or closeout smoke for Config/Data stories
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check sprint` at closeout)
- [ ] No regressions (standing gates)
- [ ] Docs reviewed (peer or producer)
- [ ] Story status updated via `/story-done` / sprint-status.yaml
- [ ] Stage remains **Release**
